---
id: multi-source-cross-detector-records
order: 20
title: Multi-Source Cross-Detector Records
status: planned
summary: Placeholder dataset record for future cross-detector transfer benchmarks spanning multiple experiments, geometries, and event modalities.
modality: mixed-detector
version: v0
data_format: Cross-detector benchmark records
access:
  type: pending
  url: null
schema_doc: schema.md
example_paths: []
facts:
  - label: Status
    value: Planned
  - label: Modality
    value: Mixed detector records
  - label: Version
    value: v0
  - label: Access
    value: Pending
used_by:
  - cross-detector-transfer
links:
  docs: null
  schema: /documentation/dataset-multi-source-cross-detector-records-schema.html
bibliography: ../../bibliography.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: mathjax
---

## Record status

This planned record is for transfer studies that compare learned detector representations across source and target detector settings. The final dataset should make the source records, target tasks, and allowed adaptation steps explicit.

## Access

The intended package command is:

```bash
pimm-data save multi-source-cross-detector-records
```

Until the package is released, this command is a stable placeholder for protocol drafts.

## Schema notes

The schema should describe source detector families, common metadata fields, held-out target tasks, split construction, and any normalization used to compare records across detector types.
